From: Andrea Carter <accounts@adeptplumbingandgas.com.au>  Sent: Wednesday, 1 April 2026 11:53 AM To: Scott Holzberger <scott@zahezone.com.au> Subject: Re: ZaheZone - MDM Solution
 
EXTERNAL EMAIL - This email was sent by a person from outside your organization. Exercise caution when clicking links, opening attachments or taking further action, before validating its authenticity. 
 
Hi Scott,
 
Apologies for the delayed response, we would like to proceed.
 
We have had lots going on at once, I am just working on the plane but the WiFi isn’t great big I will get this info over to you as soon as I can 
 
Thanks,   


 
 
 
On Thu, 26 Mar 2026 at 12:11 am, Scott Holzberger <scott@zahezone.com.au> wrote:
Hi Angela;
 
Thank you for your time this afternoon and for arranging the access to Apple Business Manager.
 
Having now reviewed this, there is slightly more configuration required within ABM – specifically:
Allocating Software Licenses for used applications;Linking to Google Workspace (for user authentication)Linking this in with an MDM solution. 
As discussed, the MDM solution is $6.00 per device per month.
To complete the additional required setup for ABM and the initial profile setup, there would be a once-off investment of $299.00.
 
If you would ike to proceed, we would require the following information:
We would require an Admin account within Google Workspace (admin.google.com)We would need a list of applications that you would like pushed out to devices.We would need a list of configuration items you would like on your devices. 
If you could please let me know if you would like to proceed with this, or if you have any other questions.
 
Cheers;
 
Scott
